name: Hurlarstringz
description:
'''Olalekan Zachariah Agbaje''', professionally known as '''Hurlarstringz''', is a [[Nigeria|Nigerian]] guitarist and composer known for blending [[Black Gospel music|Afro-gospel]], [[highlife]], [[jazz]] and African folk influences in guitar-driven compositions. His music emphasizes African rhythmic traditions and contemporary instrumental arrangements.

Agbaje gained media attention through instrumental projects such as ''Dance of the King'' and ''My Heritage'', which combined African musical traditions with modern production techniques. He performed on cultural platforms in the United Kingdom and within [[diaspora#African_diasporas|African diaspora]] communities.
